mapper.select: SELECT ac.id AS application_case_id, ac.company_name, ac.job_title, ac.posting_date, ac.status, ac.is_favorite, ac.updated_at AS application_updated_at, fa.id AS fit_analysis_id, fa.fit_score, fa.matched_skills, fa.missing_skills, fa.recommended_study, fa.recommended_certificates, fa.strategy, fa.created_at AS analyzed_at, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM interview_session interview_count_source WHERE interview_count_source.application_case_id = ac.id ) AS interview_count, ( SELECT ROUND(AVG(interview_score_source.total_score)) FROM interview_session interview_score_source WHERE interview_score_source.application_case_id = ac.id ) AS average_interview_score, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM interview_answer answer_count_source INNER JOIN interview_question answer_question ON answer_question.id = answer_count_source.question_id INNER JOIN interview_session answer_session ON answer_session.id = answer_question.interview_session_id WHERE answer_session.application_case_id = ac.id ) AS interview_answer_count, ( SELECT ROUND(AVG(answer_score_source.score)) FROM interview_answer answer_score_source INNER JOIN interview_question score_question ON score_question.id = answer_score_source.question_id INNER JOIN interview_session score_session ON score_session.id = score_question.interview_session_id WHERE score_session.application_case_id = ac.id ) AS average_interview_answer_score FROM application_case ac LEFT JOIN fit_analysis fa ON fa.application_case_id = ac.id AND fa.id = ( SELECT MAX(latest_fa.id) FROM fit_analysis latest_fa WHERE latest_fa.application_case_id = ac.id ) WHERE ac.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY ac.is_favorite DESC, COALESCE(fa.created_at, ac.updated_at) DESC, ac.id DESC
